description_long: This drone features a robust, elongated central body with a rounded nose and a more angular, faceted rear section. It is equipped with three large, dual-bladed rotors mounted on extended arms, arranged in a triangular configuration for stable flight. The rotors are dark in color and contrast with the tan and brown hues of the main body, which appears to be constructed from a combination of lightweight metal and composite materials. The rear of the drone includes a smaller, multi-bladed propeller, likely for additional stabilization or thrust. The landing gear consists of two angular, fixed legs that provide ground clearance for the body and rotors. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, possibly surveillance or delivery-oriented drone suitable for urban environments.
description: A tan and brown drone with three large rotors in a triangular layout, angular landing legs, and a small rear propeller. Its robust body and extended arms suggest a design for stable flight and urban utility.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the three large rotors, the angular arms, and the full length of the body with the rear propeller visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose, the symmetrical placement of the rotors, and the angular landing legs.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the elongated body, the angular rear section, and the alignment of the rotors and rear propeller.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the small multi-bladed rear propeller, the two main rotors, and the structure of the landing legs.
